sentences.target: On prend le bateau pour l'île.

translations.fr: On prend le bateau pour l'île.
translations.en: We are taking the boat to the island.
translations.es: Vamos en barco a la isla.
translations.de: Wir fahren mit dem Boot zur Insel.
translations.ru: Мы плывём на остров на корабле.
translations.pt: Vamos de barco para a ilha.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi thuyền ra đảo.
translations.nl: We nemen de boot naar het eiland.
translations.hi: हम नाव से द्वीप पर जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε στο νησί με το καράβι.
translations.ja: 私たちは島へ船で行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 3rd person singular, often used colloquially for ‘we’ or as an impersonal subject.
Main verb; present indicative 3rd person singular, agrees with ‘On’.
Definite article; masculine singular, introduces a specific noun.
Common noun; masculine singular, head of the NP ‘le bateau’.
Preposition; marks purpose or destination; here indicates destination (‘to’ the island).
Definite article ‘le/la’ elided before a vowel; here feminine singular with ‘île’.
Common noun; feminine singular, complement of the preposition ‘pour’.

translations.en: We dream of a quiet island.
translations.de: Wir träumen von einer ruhigen Insel.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们梦想一个安静的岛屿。
translations.yue: 我哋夢想一個寧靜嘅島。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mơ về một hòn đảo yên bình.
translations.nl: Wij dromen van een rustig eiland.
translations.hi: हम एक शांत द्वीप का सपना देखते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi drømmer om en rolig øy.
translations.id: Kami memimpikan sebuah pulau yang tenang.
translations.sv: Vi drömmer om en lugn ö.
translations.da: Vi drømmer om en rolig ø.
translations.ja: 私たちは静かな島を夢見ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 1st person plural.
Main verb; present indicative 1st person plural, agrees with ‘Nous’.
Preposition ‘de’ elided before a vowel; introduces the nominal complement.
Indefinite article; feminine singular, determiner of ‘île’.
Common noun; feminine singular, object of the preposition ‘d’’.
Adjective; feminine singular, modifies ‘île’.

sentences.target: Tu veux visiter cette île demain.

translations.fr: Tu veux visiter cette île demain.
translations.en: You want to visit this island tomorrow.
translations.de: Du willst diese Insel morgen besuchen.
translations.ko: 너는 내일 이 섬을 방문하고 싶어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你想明天参观这个岛屿。
translations.ru: Ты хочешь завтра посетить этот остров.
translations.pt: Você quer visitar esta ilha amanhã.
translations.he: אתה רוצה לבקר באי הזה מחר.
translations.tr: Yarın bu adayı ziyaret etmek istiyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn đến thăm hòn đảo này vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: أنت تريد زيارة هذه الجزيرة غدًا.
translations.nl: Je wilt morgen dit eiland bezoeken.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш завтра відвідати цей острів.
translations.hu: Holnap meg akarod látogatni ezt a szigetet.
translations.hi: तुम कल इस द्वीप की सैर करना चाहते हो.
translations.el: Θέλεις να επισκεφτείς αυτό το νησί αύριο.
translations.nb: Du vil besøke denne øya i morgen.
translations.id: Kamu ingin mengunjungi pulau ini besok.
translations.sv: Du vill besöka den här ön i morgon.
translations.ro: Vrei să vizitezi această insulă mâine.
translations.da: Du vil besøge denne ø i morgen.
translations.ja: あなたは明日この島を訪れたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; 2nd person singular, informal.
Main/modal verb; present indicative 2nd person singular.
Infinitive verb; complements ‘veux’ (infinitival complement).
Demonstrative determiner; feminine singular, deictic reference to a specific noun.
Common noun; feminine singular, direct object of ‘visiter’.
Temporal adverb; indicates future time.

sentences.target: L'île est petite mais très verte.

translations.fr: L'île est petite mais très verte.
translations.en: The island is small but very green.
translations.es: La isla es pequeña pero muy verde.
translations.de: Die Insel ist klein, aber sehr grün.
translations.it: L'isola è piccola ma molto verde.
translations.zh-Hans: 这座岛很小，但非常葱郁。
translations.yue: 嗰個島好細，但好綠油油。
translations.pt: A ilha é pequena, mas muito verde.
translations.vi: Hòn đảo nhỏ nhưng rất xanh.
translations.nl: Het eiland is klein maar heel groen.
translations.hu: A sziget kicsi, de nagyon zöld.
translations.hi: द्वीप छोटा है लेकिन बहुत हरा है.
translations.pl: Wyspa jest mała, ale bardzo zielona.
translations.el: Το νησί είναι μικρό αλλά πολύ πράσινο.
translations.nb: Øya er liten, men veldig grønn.
translations.id: Pulau itu kecil tapi sangat hijau.
translations.sv: Ön är liten men väldigt grön.
translations.ro: Insula este mică, dar foarte verde.
translations.cs: Ostrov je malý, ale velmi zelený.
translations.da: Øen er lille, men meget grøn.
translations.fi: Saari on pieni, mutta hyvin vihreä.
translations.ja: その島は小さいですが、とても緑豊かです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article ‘le/la’ elided before a vowel; here feminine singular with ‘île’.
Common noun; feminine singular, subject of the clause.
Copular verb; present indicative 3rd person singular, links subject to predicate.
Adjective; feminine singular, predicate complement agreeing with ‘île’.
Coordinating conjunction; introduces contrast.
Degree adverb; intensifies the following adjective.
Adjective; feminine singular, predicate complement coordinated with ‘petite’, agrees with ‘île’.

L'île est petite mais très verte.
en: We are taking the boat to the island.
We dream of a quiet island.
You want to visit this island tomorrow.
The island is small but very green.
